title: uniCorns X Fresh Animations addon
description: a fa addon that adds a corn on top of the horses head
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

a [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) addon that adds a corn on top of a horse like a unicorn. They're called uniCorns for a reason. It looked funny for me idk.

it is fully compatible with resource packs that changes textures
